question.question_text: What will the USD/JPY exchange rate be on 2026-03-26 (or the next available trading day)?

prediction.reasoning: For a one-day horizon, the best point estimate for USD/JPY is essentially the current rate of 159.4730, as exchange rates follow a near-random walk over short periods. Daily volatility for USD/JPY is typically around 0.5-0.7% (roughly 0.8-1.1 yen). Using ~0.5 yen as the approximate 1-sigma daily move: the 50% CI covers roughly ±0.67 sigma (~±0.5 yen), the 80% CI covers roughly ±1.28 sigma (~±1.0 yen), and the 90% CI covers roughly ±1.645 sigma (~±1.5 yen). No strong directional catalyst is assumed, so the distribution is centered on the current rate.
